title: Digital Solutions - AI & Automation - Senior Developer (Boomi + Workato) (Location: India)
company_focus:
Specialized professional services for accounting advisory,
digital solutions, and financial operations
description:
We’re looking at you—high-achievers, challenge-seekers, and
innovation-chasers.Professionals who never shy away from
complex problems. We hire the top 1% and let your talents
soar.

Preferred Skillset: Boomi/Workato

Location: HYBRID - Pune, Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi (NCR)

Shift Timing: 3pm-11:30pm IST

Level: Senior Developer (3-5 years of experience)

Are you an intellectually curious, deal oriented
professional who enjoys coming up with innovative solutions
to complex business issues? Connor Group is seeking
professionals who want to build off their existing
accounting, operational, and industry experience. We execute
finance projects and digital solutions projects that add
value to our clients within their finance, accounting, and
operations, and technology departments. From complex
technical accounting and financial reporting issues to
implementing modern technologies to finance software
implementation and automation, joining Connor Group will
help you exponentially to further develop your career and
expand your experience base.

Connor Group is a specialized professional services firm of
Big 4 alumni, and industry executives and technology
architects. Our team of highly experienced professionals
assists financial executives with their most complex
business needs, including Accounting Advisory, Digital
Solutions, Financial Operations, IPO, M&A, and Managed
Services.

Responsibilities:

- Hands on design, development, deployment, and maintenance of
  integration processes between 3rd party applications
  across cloud and/or on premise using 'Dell Boomi
  AtomSphere' platform or using Workato.
- Managing, Monitoring, Sustaining, Troubleshooting, and
  supporting existing integration implementations for our
  clients.
- Supporting developers and architects in managing and
  creating design, development, and maintenance
  documentation related to each client.
- Adapt and implement the methodologies and processes.
- Ability to establish and maintain strong working
  relationships with external and internal IT partners
- Manages the development of integration solutions and
  accountable for development, unit testing, configuration,
  business readiness, and production support.
- Demonstrated proficiency with web service technologies
  (REST, JSON, SOAP, HTTP etc.)
- Ability to work on implementations that execute in an agile
  fashion
- Ability to work with customer in understanding the
  requirements and develop the integration solutions.
- Documenting the client’s system integration and reporting
  needs.
- Building the integrations and/or configuring the Application
  programming interface or endpoint connection points where
  necessary
- Identifying integration methods – middleware or custom.
- Identifying and building transformation logic by
  understanding the client requirements and translating
  requirements into technical outputs. Transformation logic
  includes, but is not limited to, data cleansing,
  aggregation, grouping, joins/merges, and elimination.

Requirements:

- 3+ year of relevant experience
- 2+ years of experience in iPaaS integration technologies and
  complete implementation experience of Workato / Dell Boomi
  integration with NetSuite or Salesforce platform or any
  other major cloud-based platforms Integration experience
- Experience working with SaaS-based products and technologies
  like SOAP, REST, XML, WSDL, XSD, UDDI and JSON

Connor Group is committed to celebrating the value of
diversity in a globally connected business world. Our team
culture is collaborative and encourages team members to take
initiative. Our professionals are committed to excellence,
growth, and integrity. By focusing on innovation, we
continue to raise the bar on excellence and deliver greater
value to our clients.

At Connor Group, our professionals are provided with
resources and opportunities to help achieve their
professional goals while maintaining a healthy and happy
work life balance. From health insurance packages and
wellness programs to our one-on-one coaching program and
career development opportunities, we empower our
professionals by investing in their growth, health, and
happiness.

#LI-Remote

"We know that difficult problems attract some of the
brightest and most courageous people in the world."

Jeff Pickett

Connor Group Founder and Chair
responsibilities: Design, develop, deploy, and maintain integration processes between 3rd party applications using Dell Boomi AtomSphere or Workato platforms
Manage, monitor, troubleshoot, and support existing integration implementations for clients
Support developers and architects in creating design, development, and maintenance documentation for each client
Manage development of integration solutions including unit testing, configuration, business readiness, and production support
Work with customers to understand requirements and develop integration solutions
Document client system integration and reporting needs
Build integrations and configure API endpoint connections as necessary
Identify integration methods (middleware or custom) and build transformation logic including data cleansing, aggregation, joins/merges
use_cases: Enterprise application integration across cloud and on-premise systems
Finance and accounting system automation via iPaaS platforms
Data transformation and cleansing between business applications
Client system integration with platforms like NetSuite and Salesforce
Business process automation for finance and operations departments
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is focused on building integration processes using
Boomi and Workato iPaaS platforms, connecting third-party
applications via APIs. While the job title mentions "AI &
Automation," the actual responsibilities are centered on
integration development (middleware, API connections, data
transformation) rather than building, training, or deploying
AI/ML models. The "automation" here refers to business
process automation via integration, not AI system
development.
